{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324121018FEE45AD59D084D340D33"}"},"total":400},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588732925522854680","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是追剧的3部小说之一。比起重生无敌的女主，英俊霸气的男主；徐市和蜜蜜的那种有生活气息的男女主更让人喜欢。这世上哪有什么完美男女，只不过如今的小说喜欢安慰人心，满足生活中的苦难。虽然每天意犹未尽的跟剧，却满心期待着徐市和蜜蜜在生活中成长，真真成为彼此的挚爱。加油喔，作者！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766892952,"group_id":"7524618773911850008","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7K2nSJ7nY63CCgaupnO2wPzTQENIgR46ym/E3sZHXqt","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/06ee686b8e9d481f911cae75ef472daa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881073&x-signature=mNrqsDL0Pr5nbRXBBZFV%2FWPv9WA%3D","user_id":"1080171941861376","user_name":"喜欢荷花的木兰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1080171941861376","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7524618773911850008","book_info":{"abstract":"【耿直直男体制大佬&基层心机体制小职员，成熟男女，日久生情，甜宠救赎】周蜜真的只想好好生活，可遭遇骗婚，公婆算计，职场还要面临骚扰，好女人没有好家庭！
放下道德，享受人生，周蜜准备找个英俊多金的男人傍大腿，只恋爱，不谈感情！
综合条件，长相出挑、对女人大方、女友众多的酒店总裁徐有恒进入周蜜视线。
只是她的计划还没开展，就被人设计下药，她闯进了徐有恒的房间……
只是却阴差阳错睡错了人，惹上了不该惹的人……
徐仲恒：小四，那女人太有心机，你少招惹！
徐有恒：三哥，你不是不让我招惹吗？你干嘛招惹不放？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/919a96132e13f401ed6f2d4827ccc820","author":"炸毛对对","author_id":"","book_id":"7524618773911850008","book_name":"职场大佬，盯上他的新寡下属","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181000","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":474,"name":"日久生情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=474&name=日久生情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":860,"name":"相互救赎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=860&name=相互救赎&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7524625030769033790","read_count":"43550","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1110224"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"519","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,甜宠,日久生情,大佬,相互救赎","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3f31982af3f7e7b8f4c45d5c6b7276d8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779509418&x-signature=cXy0khm3psMS%2BE3qaFe0PRZF87M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3302529020472612","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"873"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324121018FEE45AD59D084D340D33"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读48小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":97992,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":171787,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6719},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7566267579410301720","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"惊喜！！不是那种千篇一律的人设，情节不落俗套，男女主还都挺接地气，感觉很真实，男主大领导，但并非那种完美不食人间烟火的，除了长得好，性格可以参考大同的耿师长，前期大男子主义，但是后面会反转，真香！！
女主这边，前期好多人说女主别扭！但是后面就会发现，女主是对的，她很清醒，很理智不恋爱脑，一直在好好的保护自己！
感觉老书虫们都会喜欢这本书","text_exts":[{"e":58,"s":54,"text":"人间烟火","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E9%97%B4%E7%83%9F%E7%81%AB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743254184D340D33%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227566267579410301720%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227524618773911850008%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E9%97%B4%E7%83%9F%E7%81%AB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761660730,"group_id":"7524618773911850008","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6RuHlA30yvJGXYC6wRqk/A=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"93176718045","user_name":"喜欢黄栀子的小寒寒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93176718045","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":25,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"is_book_forum_operator","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d5c4e7be80ba156a2703698120ff4e4","icon_width":64,"icon_height":23}","intro":"{"title_name":"运营官","title_detail":"《霸道的职场大佬，新寡的她》的书圈运营官是一个珍贵的头衔，授予兼具创作力与责任心的书友，肩负活跃书圈的使命！","title_id":"is_book_forum_operator","big_icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0151264e36a6375ece6f9471ed95de86","detail_url":"dragon1967://webview?url=https%3A%2F%2Freading.snssdk.com%2Fwap%2Fbook-operator.html"}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"运营官","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"#
